name: Raw Fruit Pie or Tart with Apple-Juice Glaze
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Raw fruit (bananas, berries, plums, or any fruit except raw papaya or pineapple)
or 8 small ready-to-fill sponge cake cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Defrost apple juice just enough to remove it from the can.
2. Sprinkle gelatin on cold water and wait 1 minute.
3. Heat gently until the gelatin dissolves, then remove from heat.
4. Stir in undiluted apple juice until melted.
5. Refrigerate until syrupy.
6. Arrange fruit attractively in pie crust or tart or sponge cake cups.
7. When the apple gelatin is slightly thick, spoon it gently over the fruit using only as much needed to entrap the fruit in a see-through glaze (about 1/2 to 2/3 of the amount).
8. Chill until set. Store in the refrigerator.
